name: Shanghai Lonyer Fuels Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Lonyer Fuels Co., Ltd. trades in oil products in China. The company has an oil storage base with a total capacity of approximately 70,000 cubic meters, as well as five refined oil transportation vessels and refueling vessels for oil trading, maritime transportation, and water refueling. The company also engages in the non-ferrous metals trading business; and provision of cloud data infrastructure services. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
